title: Family move: compare housing, relocation, insurance & banking
intro: Once 2–4 city finalists exist, most families line up housing platforms, relocation support, mandatory health insurance, utilities, and banking in parallel — especially with school start dates or employer packages in play. Scope, waitlists, and fees differ; confirm what your employer covers and what you must arrange yourself before retainers or deposits.
disclosure: Some links may be affiliate or referral links. If you use them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Ordering reflects relevance to family relocation and Dutch setup after you shortlist cities — not pay-to-rank. This is not legal, tax, immigration, or school-placement advice — verify with municipalities, schools, childcare providers, and qualified advisers.
